title: MEN SHELTER - 211info
text: MEN'S MISSION MEN SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter. Services available to guests include food, emergency clothing, laundry, mail services, faith-based addiction and mental health counseling, and case management. Guests may have the opportunity to move forward into the New Life Fellowship transitional housing program. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older. Service animals accepted. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 362-3983 Main phone (503) 399-8673 FAX Main phone (503) 362-3983 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID (may be obtained after intake) AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Commercial and Center Streets. Accessible via Salem Mass Transit Bus 1. Enter through the large double doors at the courtyard on the south side of the building. Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Men Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - DAY ROOM FOOD - MEALS MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWER FACILITIES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FOOT CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEN'S MISSION
